records.m_Talk_ENG: We've cleared the front! Pendulum reaction on the right! More incoming!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We've cleared the front! Pendulum reaction on the right! More incoming!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We've cleared the front! Pendulum reaction on the right! More incoming!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I found footprints. I'll handle it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I found footprints. I'll handle it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I found footprints. I'll handle it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's still reacting! One more...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's still reacting! One more...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's still reacting! One more...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? But the footprints just disappeared...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? But the footprints just disappeared...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? But the footprints just disappeared...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Found it!
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Found it!
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Found it!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Phew...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Phew...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Phew...

records.m_Talk_ENG: This one stepped on the puppets as it came so it wouldn't leave footprints.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This one stepped on the puppets as it came so it wouldn't leave footprints.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This one stepped on the puppets as it came so it wouldn't leave footprints.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's impressive. You figured that out just from the sound? I didn't hear anything.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's impressive. You figured that out just from the sound? I didn't hear anything.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's impressive. You figured that out just from the sound? I didn't hear anything.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha...

records.m_Talk_ENG: No pendulum reaction. Everything around here's been cleared.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No pendulum reaction. Everything around here's been cleared.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No pendulum reaction. Everything around here's been cleared.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Good work, everyone. We've already made it halfway up the mountain.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Good work, everyone. We've already made it halfway up the mountain.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Good work, everyone. We've already made it halfway up the mountain.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thanks to General Musketeer's Key and Nicole Primer's pendulum.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thanks to General Musketeer's Key and Nicole Primer's pendulum.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thanks to General Musketeer's Key and Nicole Primer's pendulum.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But the higher we go, the fiercer the dolls' resistance is getting.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But the higher we go, the fiercer the dolls' resistance is getting.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But the higher we go, the fiercer the dolls' resistance is getting.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We won't make it in time at this rate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We won't make it in time at this rate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We won't make it in time at this rate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She's right. The Golden Tree's influence is gradually fading our existence even now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She's right. The Golden Tree's influence is gradually fading our existence even now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She's right. The Golden Tree's influence is gradually fading our existence even now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: At this pace, we'll disappear before we even reach the summit.
records.m_Talk_DEU: At this pace, we'll disappear before we even reach the summit.
records.m_Talk_FRA: At this pace, we'll disappear before we even reach the summit.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Isn't there any way we can move faster?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Isn't there any way we can move faster?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Isn't there any way we can move faster?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even the ship and an Armored Horse like Hermit are having their power suppressed by the Divinity.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even the ship and an Armored Horse like Hermit are having their power suppressed by the Divinity.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even the ship and an Armored Horse like Hermit are having their power suppressed by the Divinity.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It doesn't look like there's any good way for all of us to shake off the dolls and reach the summit quickly.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It doesn't look like there's any good way for all of us to shake off the dolls and reach the summit quickly.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It doesn't look like there's any good way for all of us to shake off the dolls and reach the summit quickly.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
If anything, maybe splitting up to look for a shortcut
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
If anything, maybe splitting up to look for a shortcut
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
If anything, maybe splitting up to look for a shortcut
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Commander! Behind you!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Commander! Behind you!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Commander! Behind you!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dammit.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dammit.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dammit.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I didn't realize there was still a C.O.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I didn't realize there was still a C.O.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I didn't realize there was still a C.O.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thanks for taking care of it, Sergeant.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thanks for taking care of it, Sergeant.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thanks for taking care of it, Sergeant.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Impressive. You pulled the trigger once and nearly blew Commander away with the aftershock.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Impressive. You pulled the trigger once and nearly blew Commander away with the aftershock.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Impressive. You pulled the trigger once and nearly blew Commander away with the aftershock.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now's not the time to be impressed when Commander just got pinned under Hermit?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now's not the time to be impressed when Commander just got pinned under Hermit?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now's not the time to be impressed when Commander just got pinned under Hermit?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah, sorry! I panicked and put too much force into the shot!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah, sorry! I panicked and put too much force into the shot!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah, sorry! I panicked and put too much force into the shot!

records.m_Talk_ENG: That rifle you're using, Sergeant. Was it made with a Counter Watch?
records.m_Talk_DEU: That rifle you're using, Sergeant. Was it made with a Counter Watch?
records.m_Talk_FRA: That rifle you're using, Sergeant. Was it made with a Counter Watch?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No. My ability isn't that impressive. This gear was forged from Alternium.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No. My ability isn't that impressive. This gear was forged from Alternium.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No. My ability isn't that impressive. This gear was forged from Alternium.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Alternium... I see.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Alternium... I see.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Alternium... I see.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is something wrong, Noelle?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is something wrong, Noelle?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is something wrong, Noelle?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah. For a brief moment, the Divinity disappeared where the Sergeant's bullet passed through.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah. For a brief moment, the Divinity disappeared where the Sergeant's bullet passed through.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah. For a brief moment, the Divinity disappeared where the Sergeant's bullet passed through.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It felt like it opened a path along the bullet's trajectory.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It felt like it opened a path along the bullet's trajectory.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It felt like it opened a path along the bullet's trajectory.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My bullet opened a path?
records.m_Talk_DEU: My bullet opened a path?
records.m_Talk_FRA: My bullet opened a path?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If that's true, that's pretty useful information.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If that's true, that's pretty useful information.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If that's true, that's pretty useful information.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In theory, that means a dimensional ship could pass through in the gap created by Christina's bullet, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: In theory, that means a dimensional ship could pass through in the gap created by Christina's bullet, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: In theory, that means a dimensional ship could pass through in the gap created by Christina's bullet, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's... probably not possible.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's... probably not possible.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's... probably not possible.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is it because the opening only lasts a short time?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is it because the opening only lasts a short time?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is it because the opening only lasts a short time?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Yes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Yes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It only lasted about 0.3 seconds.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It only lasted about 0.3 seconds.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It only lasted about 0.3 seconds.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...0.3 seconds?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...0.3 seconds?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...0.3 seconds?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even flying the shortest route to the summit, we'd still have to cover at least the distance we've already traveled!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even flying the shortest route to the summit, we'd still have to cover at least the distance we've already traveled!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even flying the shortest route to the summit, we'd still have to cover at least the distance we've already traveled!

records.m_Talk_ENG: If it's a bullet carrying the power of Alternium, that's enough distance.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If it's a bullet carrying the power of Alternium, that's enough distance.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If it's a bullet carrying the power of Alternium, that's enough distance.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But to keep extending across that maximum range without stopping, the bullet's speed would have to be just as fast.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But to keep extending across that maximum range without stopping, the bullet's speed would have to be just as fast.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But to keep extending across that maximum range without stopping, the bullet's speed would have to be just as fast.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The rounds fired by Sergeant Brecht using Griffin 1 travel at ten times the speed of sound.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The rounds fired by Sergeant Brecht using Griffin 1 travel at ten times the speed of sound.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The rounds fired by Sergeant Brecht using Griffin 1 travel at ten times the speed of sound.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Which means they're extremely fast.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Which means they're extremely fast.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Which means they're extremely fast.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then the problem is that we don't have any means of transporting a person at that kind of speed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then the problem is that we don't have any means of transporting a person at that kind of speed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then the problem is that we don't have any means of transporting a person at that kind of speed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wouldn't a dimensional ship make it possible?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wouldn't a dimensional ship make it possible?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wouldn't a dimensional ship make it possible?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Unfortunately, the Eternium Drive's warp technology can't distort Divinity.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Unfortunately, the Eternium Drive's warp technology can't distort Divinity.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Unfortunately, the Eternium Drive's warp technology can't distort Divinity.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As long as we don't distort the laws of physics, even a dimensional ship can't reach that kind of speed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As long as we don't distort the laws of physics, even a dimensional ship can't reach that kind of speed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As long as we don't distort the laws of physics, even a dimensional ship can't reach that kind of speed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This won't be easy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This won't be easy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This won't be easy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's more than not easy. It's impossible for a person to move that fast.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's more than not easy. It's impossible for a person to move that fast.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's more than not easy. It's impossible for a person to move that fast.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Certainly, by human standards, it may be impossible.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Certainly, by human standards, it may be impossible.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Certainly, by human standards, it may be impossible.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I can do it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I can do it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I can do it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Horizon!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Horizon!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Horizon!

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's...
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...The angel we saw at Ground One?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...The angel we saw at Ground One?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...The angel we saw at Ground One?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If Sergeant Brecht opens a path and Horizon crosses through it...
records.m_Talk_DEU: If Sergeant Brecht opens a path and Horizon crosses through it...
records.m_Talk_FRA: If Sergeant Brecht opens a path and Horizon crosses through it...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I understand the plan up to that point, but what comes after that concerns me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I understand the plan up to that point, but what comes after that concerns me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I understand the plan up to that point, but what comes after that concerns me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why are you the one accompanying Horizon, Boss?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why are you the one accompanying Horizon, Boss?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why are you the one accompanying Horizon, Boss?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry. With the inertia-canceling field of the Simurgh Silhouette, I can safely bring along one companion.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry. With the inertia-canceling field of the Simurgh Silhouette, I can safely bring along one companion.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry. With the inertia-canceling field of the Simurgh Silhouette, I can safely bring along one companion.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's not the issue right now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's not the issue right now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's not the issue right now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is that really a better decision than sending me or Shiyoon instead?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is that really a better decision than sending me or Shiyoon instead?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is that really a better decision than sending me or Shiyoon instead?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We're not going there to fight, so Horizon alone is enough combat strength.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We're not going there to fight, so Horizon alone is enough combat strength.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We're not going there to fight, so Horizon alone is enough combat strength.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is a method to stop our existence from being erased by the Golden Tree's Divinity.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is a method to stop our existence from being erased by the Golden Tree's Divinity.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is a method to stop our existence from being erased by the Golden Tree's Divinity.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I sincerely hope you succeed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I sincerely hope you succeed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I sincerely hope you succeed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you for trusting me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you for trusting me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you for trusting me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Should I climb onto your back?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Should I climb onto your back?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Should I climb onto your back?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll secure you myself. Please stay still.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll secure you myself. Please stay still.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll secure you myself. Please stay still.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Um, wait a second.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Um, wait a second.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Um, wait a second.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone's acting like this is obvious... But can I really open a path?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone's acting like this is obvious... But can I really open a path?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone's acting like this is obvious... But can I really open a path?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What if that first time was just a coincidence?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What if that first time was just a coincidence?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What if that first time was just a coincidence?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's unlikely that the Golden Tree's Divinity opening a path for your bullet was just coincidence.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's unlikely that the Golden Tree's Divinity opening a path for your bullet was just coincidence.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's unlikely that the Golden Tree's Divinity opening a path for your bullet was just coincidence.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The presence within it is... closely connected to Thagirion's world as well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The presence within it is... closely connected to Thagirion's world as well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The presence within it is... closely connected to Thagirion's world as well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This Alternium... is connected to Thagirion?
records.m_Talk_DEU: This Alternium... is connected to Thagirion?
records.m_Talk_FRA: This Alternium... is connected to Thagirion?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Multiple high-level C.O.s from the south... They're heading this way!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Multiple high-level C.O.s from the south... They're heading this way!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Multiple high-level C.O.s from the south... They're heading this way!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The pendulum's reacting too. It looks like they're trying to interfere with us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The pendulum's reacting too. It looks like they're trying to interfere with us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The pendulum's reacting too. It looks like they're trying to interfere with us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then I'll leave it to you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then I'll leave it to you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then I'll leave it to you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Leave this to us and go.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Leave this to us and go.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Leave this to us and go.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We'll see you again safely.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We'll see you again safely.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We'll see you again safely.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Target locked. Firing at maximum output...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Target locked. Firing at maximum output...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Target locked. Firing at maximum output...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've finished calculating the trajectory as well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've finished calculating the trajectory as well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've finished calculating the trajectory as well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You appear to be a human whose combat capability isn't even worth measuring...
records.m_Talk_DEU: You appear to be a human whose combat capability isn't even worth measuring...
records.m_Talk_FRA: You appear to be a human whose combat capability isn't even worth measuring...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Still, I'll trust that there must be a reason a fragile human like you made it this far.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Still, I'll trust that there must be a reason a fragile human like you made it this far.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Still, I'll trust that there must be a reason a fragile human like you made it this far.

root.m_Talk_DEU: Alternium... I see.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Alternium... I see.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is something wrong, Noelle?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is something wrong, Noelle?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is something wrong, Noelle?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah. For a brief moment, the Divinity disappeared where the Sergeant's bullet passed through.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah. For a brief moment, the Divinity disappeared where the Sergeant's bullet passed through.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah. For a brief moment, the Divinity disappeared where the Sergeant's bullet passed through.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It felt like it opened a path along the bullet's trajectory.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It felt like it opened a path along the bullet's trajectory.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It felt like it opened a path along the bullet's trajectory.

root.m_Talk_ENG: My bullet opened a path?
root.m_Talk_DEU: My bullet opened a path?
root.m_Talk_FRA: My bullet opened a path?

root.m_Talk_ENG: If that's true, that's pretty useful information.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If that's true, that's pretty useful information.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If that's true, that's pretty useful information.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In theory, that means a dimensional ship could pass through in the gap created by Christina's bullet, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: In theory, that means a dimensional ship could pass through in the gap created by Christina's bullet, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: In theory, that means a dimensional ship could pass through in the gap created by Christina's bullet, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's... probably not possible.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's... probably not possible.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's... probably not possible.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is it because the opening only lasts a short time?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is it because the opening only lasts a short time?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is it because the opening only lasts a short time?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yes.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Yes.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Yes.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It only lasted about 0.3 seconds.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It only lasted about 0.3 seconds.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It only lasted about 0.3 seconds.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...0.3 seconds?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...0.3 seconds?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...0.3 seconds?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even flying the shortest route to the summit, we'd still have to cover at least the distance we've already traveled!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even flying the shortest route to the summit, we'd still have to cover at least the distance we've already traveled!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even flying the shortest route to the summit, we'd still have to cover at least the distance we've already traveled!

root.m_Talk_ENG: If it's a bullet carrying the power of Alternium, that's enough distance.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If it's a bullet carrying the power of Alternium, that's enough distance.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If it's a bullet carrying the power of Alternium, that's enough distance.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But to keep extending across that maximum range without stopping, the bullet's speed would have to be just as fast.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But to keep extending across that maximum range without stopping, the bullet's speed would have to be just as fast.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But to keep extending across that maximum range without stopping, the bullet's speed would have to be just as fast.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The rounds fired by Sergeant Brecht using Griffin 1 travel at ten times the speed of sound.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The rounds fired by Sergeant Brecht using Griffin 1 travel at ten times the speed of sound.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The rounds fired by Sergeant Brecht using Griffin 1 travel at ten times the speed of sound.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Which means they're extremely fast.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Which means they're extremely fast.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Which means they're extremely fast.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then the problem is that we don't have any means of transporting a person at that kind of speed.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then the problem is that we don't have any means of transporting a person at that kind of speed.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then the problem is that we don't have any means of transporting a person at that kind of speed.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wouldn't a dimensional ship make it possible?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wouldn't a dimensional ship make it possible?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wouldn't a dimensional ship make it possible?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Unfortunately, the Eternium Drive's warp technology can't distort Divinity.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Unfortunately, the Eternium Drive's warp technology can't distort Divinity.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Unfortunately, the Eternium Drive's warp technology can't distort Divinity.

root.m_Talk_ENG: As long as we don't distort the laws of physics, even a dimensional ship can't reach that kind of speed.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As long as we don't distort the laws of physics, even a dimensional ship can't reach that kind of speed.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As long as we don't distort the laws of physics, even a dimensional ship can't reach that kind of speed.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This won't be easy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This won't be easy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This won't be easy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's more than not easy. It's impossible for a person to move that fast.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's more than not easy. It's impossible for a person to move that fast.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's more than not easy. It's impossible for a person to move that fast.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Certainly, by human standards, it may be impossible.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Certainly, by human standards, it may be impossible.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Certainly, by human standards, it may be impossible.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But I can do it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But I can do it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But I can do it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Horizon!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Horizon!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Horizon!

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's...
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's...
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's...

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...The angel we saw at Ground One?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...The angel we saw at Ground One?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...The angel we saw at Ground One?

root.m_Talk_ENG: If Sergeant Brecht opens a path and Horizon crosses through it...
root.m_Talk_DEU: If Sergeant Brecht opens a path and Horizon crosses through it...
root.m_Talk_FRA: If Sergeant Brecht opens a path and Horizon crosses through it...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I understand the plan up to that point, but what comes after that concerns me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I understand the plan up to that point, but what comes after that concerns me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I understand the plan up to that point, but what comes after that concerns me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why are you the one accompanying Horizon, Boss?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why are you the one accompanying Horizon, Boss?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why are you the one accompanying Horizon, Boss?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry. With the inertia-canceling field of the Simurgh Silhouette, I can safely bring along one companion.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry. With the inertia-canceling field of the Simurgh Silhouette, I can safely bring along one companion.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry. With the inertia-canceling field of the Simurgh Silhouette, I can safely bring along one companion.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's not the issue right now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's not the issue right now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's not the issue right now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is that really a better decision than sending me or Shiyoon instead?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is that really a better decision than sending me or Shiyoon instead?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is that really a better decision than sending me or Shiyoon instead?

root.m_Talk_ENG: We're not going there to fight, so Horizon alone is enough combat strength.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We're not going there to fight, so Horizon alone is enough combat strength.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We're not going there to fight, so Horizon alone is enough combat strength.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is a method to stop our existence from being erased by the Golden Tree's Divinity.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is a method to stop our existence from being erased by the Golden Tree's Divinity.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is a method to stop our existence from being erased by the Golden Tree's Divinity.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I sincerely hope you succeed.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I sincerely hope you succeed.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I sincerely hope you succeed.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you for trusting me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you for trusting me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you for trusting me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Should I climb onto your back?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Should I climb onto your back?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Should I climb onto your back?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll secure you myself. Please stay still.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll secure you myself. Please stay still.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll secure you myself. Please stay still.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Um, wait a second.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Um, wait a second.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Um, wait a second.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone's acting like this is obvious... But can I really open a path?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone's acting like this is obvious... But can I really open a path?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone's acting like this is obvious... But can I really open a path?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What if that first time was just a coincidence?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What if that first time was just a coincidence?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What if that first time was just a coincidence?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's unlikely that the Golden Tree's Divinity opening a path for your bullet was just coincidence.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's unlikely that the Golden Tree's Divinity opening a path for your bullet was just coincidence.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's unlikely that the Golden Tree's Divinity opening a path for your bullet was just coincidence.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The presence within it is... closely connected to Thagirion's world as well.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The presence within it is... closely connected to Thagirion's world as well.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The presence within it is... closely connected to Thagirion's world as well.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This Alternium... is connected to Thagirion?
root.m_Talk_DEU: This Alternium... is connected to Thagirion?
root.m_Talk_FRA: This Alternium... is connected to Thagirion?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Multiple high-level C.O.s from the south... They're heading this way!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Multiple high-level C.O.s from the south... They're heading this way!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Multiple high-level C.O.s from the south... They're heading this way!

root.m_Talk_ENG: The pendulum's reacting too. It looks like they're trying to interfere with us.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The pendulum's reacting too. It looks like they're trying to interfere with us.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The pendulum's reacting too. It looks like they're trying to interfere with us.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then I'll leave it to you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then I'll leave it to you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then I'll leave it to you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Leave this to us and go.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Leave this to us and go.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Leave this to us and go.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We'll see you again safely.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We'll see you again safely.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We'll see you again safely.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Target locked. Firing at maximum output...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Target locked. Firing at maximum output...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Target locked. Firing at maximum output...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I've finished calculating the trajectory as well.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I've finished calculating the trajectory as well.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I've finished calculating the trajectory as well.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You appear to be a human whose combat capability isn't even worth measuring...
root.m_Talk_DEU: You appear to be a human whose combat capability isn't even worth measuring...
root.m_Talk_FRA: You appear to be a human whose combat capability isn't even worth measuring...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Still, I'll trust that there must be a reason a fragile human like you made it this far.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Still, I'll trust that there must be a reason a fragile human like you made it this far.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Still, I'll trust that there must be a reason a fragile human like you made it this far.
